docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZHU, KAREN SU YIN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BRANNAN, ALLAN PAUL JUDGTMENT ENTERED IN SCA 27724 ON DECEMBER 03,2004 EXHIBITS RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS.JUDGT IS ORDERED IN FAVOR OF ALLAN PAUL BRANNAN-APPELLANT & AGAINST KAREN SU YIN ZHU-RESPONDENT.
